title: spilanthes americana var. parvula
intro: Spilanthes americana var. parvula, also known as American bitterweed, is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter principles, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spilanthes americana var. parvula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
